results.title: NYT publisher AG Sulzberger criticized President Trump's incursions on press freedom and chastised some news outlets for capitulating to the president (Gregory Svirnovskiy/Politico)
results.description: Gregory Svirnovskiy / Politico : NYT publisher AG Sulzberger criticized President Trump's incursions on press freedom and chastised some news outlets for capitulating to the president — Sulzberger reprehended publications he said have settled “winnable cases” with the president, refocused their editorial pages away ...

results.title: Breaking: Orduen wins ADC ticket for House of Representatives in Vandeikya/Konshisha
results.description: Dr. Aondoaseer Gbe Benjamin Orduen, AG-BEN, secures ADC candidacy for Vandeikya/Konshisha in 2027 elections, promising grassroots solutions and unity.
